titleStmt.title: SII 31.17: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 17. (A.R. No. B 299 of 1937.) BHAṬṬIPRŌLU, REPALLE TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the a fourth pillar in the Kalyāṇa maṇḍapa of the temple of Viṭṭhalēśvara svāmi.
It is dated in the 18th regnal year and Śaka 1085, Pushya śu. - Saturday (sauri vāramu) The date of the record corresponds to either November 30 or December 7. 1163 A.D.

Badly damaged. Records a gift of 55 sheep (goṟiyalu) for maintaining a perpetual lamp in the temple of Bhōgīśvara Mahādēva by certain • • • nāyaka, probably son Kēṁchemanāyaka, who was the son of Bhaṭṭiprōli Kāllapanāyaka, the mūlabhṛitya of mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Kulōttuṅga Rājēndra Chōḍa. The gift was handed over to Dāmena son of Veṇya bōya with the stipulation to supply one māneka of ghee, daily for its maintenance.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śrīmattiḥbhuvana cakrava¨rtti
śrīrājarājadēvara divyarājyasaṁva
tsaraṁbuṭu 18 śrīmatuśakava
¨rṣamulu 1085 Agunēṁṭṭi pauṣyaśu
ddhasaurivāramunuttarāyaṇasaṁ
krāṁtti nimittamunu śrīmanmahāma
ṇḍalēśvara kulōttuṁga rājēṁdracōḍaya
mūlabhṛtyuṁḍaina bhaṭṭiprō
li kālapanāyani tra ke
ṁ cemanāyani
ki suputuḥ
panāyaku
llidaṁḍrulu

gāśrīmadbhōgīśvara mahādēva
ra kācaṁdrā¨rkka sthāyigā na
khaṁḍa dīpamunakuṁ beṭṭina
gōṟiyalu 55 vīniṁ jēkoni
venya bōyuni dāmena dana pu
trānu pautrikamugāṁ daratarā
na nityamāneṁḍu nētipaḍinā
caṁdrā¨rkamu naḍapaṁgalavāṁḍu .
dīniki na ta
mu Amānuṣamu pū
śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 31.17 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
